channel.title: Energy Plan on Utility Explained
channel.description: Recent content in Energy Plan on Utility Explained

item.title: Fixed vs Variable Utility Rates: Which One Saves You More Money?
item.description:
Fixed vs Variable Utility Rates: Which One Saves You More Money?

If you live in a state with energy choice (deregulated market), you’ve probably seen offers to “lock in” your electricity or gas rate for 12–36 months. Is that a good deal? Should you float with the market instead? Or is there a third option?

This guide breaks down fixed vs variable utility rates, explains when each makes sense, and gives you a decision framework.
